name: The Pope and the Führer - The Secret Vatican Files of World War II
original_name: The Pope and the Führer - The Secret Vatican Files of World War II
overview: Pope Pius XII, the man who led the Church through WWII, has been maligned by history as the Pope that could have stood against Hitler, but remained silent. Recent archival revelations, however, tell a different story. What is the truth? How did he respond to the Nazi threat? And who told his story?

trailers.title: The Pope and the Führer: The Secret Vatican Files of World War II | The First 15 Minutes
